user.title: Daily Bible Text – Setup
user.description:
Upload your EPUB file, or enter the path to an existing file.

Uploaded files are stored in `/config/daily_bible_text/`.

data.show_verse_reference: Show Bible reference at end of Scripture

data_description.epub_file: Drag & drop or browse your .epub file

error.file_not_found: File not found – please check the path.
error.invalid_epub: The file could not be read as a valid EPUB.
error.no_epub_provided: Please upload a file or enter a path.

init.title: Daily Bible Text – Options
init.description: Replace the EPUB file or change settings.

data.show_verse_reference: Show Bible reference at end of Scripture

error.file_not_found: File not found – please check the path.
error.invalid_epub: The file could not be read as a valid EPUB.

outdated_epub.title: Daily Bible Text – Outdated EPUB ({epub_year})
outdated_epub.description:
The configured EPUB is from **{epub_year}**, but the current year is **{current_year}**. The texts shown may be incorrect.

Please upload the EPUB for {current_year} via **Settings → Integrations → Daily Bible Text → Configure**.
